title: Device Home Screen - No device connected - Select Device link
scenario: When no device is connected, tapping "Select Device" shows supported devices with images and an "Other devices" button linking to Poly support.
steps: Observe the list of supported devices displayed with their images.
Check the bottom of the list for an 'Other devices' button.
expected: A list of supported devices with images is displayed. Tapping the 'Other devices' button opens the Poly support web page.
